tutorial.claim.continue: Press Continue Playing to keep going.

tutorial.move.remove_grave: Move the selected {level} onto the grave to remove it.
tutorial.move.capture_tower: Move the selected {level} onto the highlighted hex to destroy the tower and capture the hex.
tutorial.move.capture_tree: Move the selected {level} onto the highlighted hex to clear the tree and capture the hex.
tutorial.move.capture: Move the selected {level} onto the highlighted hex to capture it.
tutorial.move.generic: Move the unit to the highlighted hex.
tutorial.buy.upgrade: Now press the Buy Recruit button again to upgrade to a {level}.
tutorial.buy.cycle: Press the Buy Recruit button to cycle to a {level}.
tutorial.place.combine: Place the {level} onto the target {target} to combine them into a {combined}.
tutorial.place.generic: Place the {level} at the highlighted hex.
tutorial.place.capture_tower: Place the {level} at the highlighted hex to destroy the tower and capture the hex.
tutorial.place.capture_tree: Place the {level} at the highlighted hex to clear the tree and capture the hex.
tutorial.place.capture_grave: Place the {level} at the highlighted hex to remove the grave and capture the hex.
tutorial.place.capture: Place the {level} at the highlighted hex to capture it.

tutorial.place.remove_grave: Place the {level} at the highlighted hex to remove the grave.
hud.tooltip.add_narration: Insert a tutorial-only narration beat here
hud.tooltip.add_select: Insert a tutorial-only select-territory beat (captures the current selection)

hud.tooltip.next_unit_hold: Next Unit — N (hold for next tier)
hud.bankrupt.title: Bankrupt next turn
hud.bankrupt.body: All units in this territory will die
hud.losing_gold.title: Losing gold
hud.losing_gold.body: This territory spends more than it earns each turn
hud.overlay.claim_victory.title: Claim Victory?
hud.tour.turn.title: Turn & players
hud.tour.turn.body: The current turn number and player color.
hud.tour.treasury.title: Treasury & balance
hud.tour.treasury.body: The selected territory's gold, income, and upkeep. Yellow if the territory is losing gold. Red if the territory is bankrupt next turn.
hud.tour.buy.title: Buy units
hud.tour.buy.body: Buy a unit, or upgrade toward Soldier, Captain, and Commander by merging with a previously placed unit.
hud.tour.buy.body.collapsed: Buy a unit — {verb} repeatedly to cycle unit type. Upgrade toward Soldier, Captain, and Commander by merging with a previously placed unit.
hud.tour.tower.title: Build tower
hud.tour.tower.body: Buy a defensive tower on one of your hexes, defending the hexes around it against capture.
hud.tour.undo.title: Undo & redo
hud.tour.undo.body: Step back or forward through this turn's moves. Hold either button to undo or redo the whole turn at once.
hud.tour.next_unit.title: Next unit
hud.tour.next_unit.body: Select your next unmoved unit in the selected territory. Hold to skip to the next power tier.
hud.tour.next_territory.title: Next territory
hud.tour.next_territory.body: Select your next territory that still has an action available. It glows once the current territory's actions are exhausted.
hud.tour.end_turn.title: End turn
hud.tour.end_turn.body: Finish your turn and pass play on. It glows once all territories have been visited.
hud.tour.automate.title: Automate
hud.tour.automate.body: Automate the rest of the turn. All actions are added to the undo stack.
hud.tour.options.title: Options
hud.tour.options.body: Pause to save, load, change settings, or exit to the menu.
hud.tour.intro.title: Guided tour
hud.tour.intro.body: Use Next and Back to step through the HUD UI elements. {Verb} any element to select it. Close returns to play.
hud.tour.help.title: Help
hud.tour.help.body: Open the Help menu for instructions on how to play the game, or to run this guided tour again.
hud.help.title: Help
hud.instructions.page.territories.title: Territories & Capitals
hud.instructions.page.territories.body: Your land is divided into territories — connected groups of hexes of your color. Each territory has a capital, which stores that territory's gold. Each territory earns, spends, and fights on its own. Combining territories pools their gold, units, and income.
hud.instructions.page.recruit.title: Recruits
hud.instructions.page.recruit.body: The first unit you can buy is a Recruit, represented by a circle. You can place it anywhere in your territory and reposition it as desired. The Recruit's circle will pulse as long as it has an unconsumed action. Chopping trees and capturing territory will consume an action.
hud.instructions.page.defense.title: Defense
hud.instructions.page.defense.body: Pieces (units, capitals, and towers) will defend the hex they are on and the 6 surrounding hexes. When capturing territory you'll need to use a unit that's strong enough to overcome defense. In this example, we need a Soldier (two circles) to capture a tile defended by a Capital.
hud.instructions.page.towers.title: Towers
hud.instructions.page.towers.body: Players can purchase and place towers for additional defense. Towers provide level 2 defensive strength — the same as a Soldier. To overcome their defense you will need a Captain (3 circles). You can combine a Soldier and a Recruit to form a Captain.
hud.instructions.page.commander.title: The Commander
hud.instructions.page.commander.body: The most powerful unit is the Commander, represented by four concentric circles. Only a Commander can capture a hex protected by an enemy Captain. But beware — the Commander also has the highest upkeep costs...
hud.instructions.page.income.title: Income & Upkeep
hud.instructions.page.income.body: Every hex in a territory earns gold each turn, stored in its capital. Units cost upkeep each turn: the stronger the unit, the higher the cost. A yellow warning appears when the territory is losing gold, and turns red when bankruptcy is expected next turn. When a territory goes bankrupt, all its units die.
hud.instructions.page.trees.title: Trees
hud.instructions.page.trees.body: Graves turn into trees the following turn. Trees spread to adjacent hexes at the start of each turn: an empty hex with two or more neighboring trees, or one neighboring tree and a water hex, will spawn a tree.
hud.instructions.page.winning.title: Winning the Game
hud.instructions.page.winning.body: To win the game you must take control of the island. When you control more than half of the hexes on the map you can claim victory, or you can continue playing until you have eliminated every other player and achieved total domination.

mapinfo.playing_as: You will be playing as the {name} player.
campaign.status.won: Already won — replaying can't lose it.
campaign.blurb.fog_of_war: Fog Of War — Explore to reveal the map!
intro.rising_tides: Rising Tides — the sea rises every turn. Coastal hexes submerge and the map keeps shrinking, so ground you hold now can vanish beneath the waves.
intro.fog_of_war: Fog of War — the map begins hidden. Your territories light up the ground around them; everything else stays dark until you scout it. Undo and Redo are disabled in this mode.
intro.viking_raiders: Viking Raiders — Vikings are invading your island. Viking units pay no upkeep but their forces can't grow after they land on shore. Stand by to repel the invaders!
intro.gold_hex: Gold hex — this hex earns 5× the gold of an ordinary hex for the controlling player.
intro.mountain_hex: Mountain hex — a unit or tower on a mountain hex gains +1 defensive bonus — so a Recruit on a mountain defends like a Soldier.

editor.tooltip.gold: Place / remove a gold hex (5× income)
